description: Canonical encoding test vectors for SOL-DCC ZK Bridge (v2.0 with boundary vectors)

vectors.name: Cross-chain collision test — SOL→DCC vs DCC→SOL
vectors.note: Must differ from V-001 (chain IDs swapped)

vectors.name: All-zero asset_id (invalid but should still hash)
Amount = 0 (should hash but would be rejected by contract)
src_chain_id = dst_chain_id (should still hash, rejected by logic)
Deposit mutation test — amount+1 must differ
Deposit mutation test — recipient bit flip must differ
vectors.note: Must differ from V-001 (last byte of recipient flipped)

vectors.name: SPL token deposit (different asset_id)
vectors.note: USDC-like SPL token mint address as asset_id

vectors.name: Negative test — single byte difference in domain_sep
vectors.note: NEGATIVE: V2 domain_sep must produce different hash than V-001 (V1)

vectors.name: Negative expiry unlock (signed i64)
vectors.note: NEGATIVE: Negative expiry should be rejected by on-chain validation

vectors.name: RIDE: max u32 event_index (4294967295)
vectors.note: Tests RIDE intToLE4 at u32 boundary. event_index = 0xFFFFFFFF. RIDE Int can hold this since it is i64.

vectors.name: RIDE: near-max safe slot (JS Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER)
vectors.note: Tests RIDE intToLE8 with slot=9007199254740991 (2^53-1). Well within RIDE i64 range. Large nonce=999999999.

vectors.name: Boundary — all u64 fields at MAX, event_index at u32::MAX
Boundary — all fields zero (except domain separator)
